job.title: Java Developer
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: Join our Java development team in Montpellier. You design and develop high-performance backend applications for various clients in an Agile environment.
mission.1: Développer des applications Java / Spring Boot
mission.2: Concevoir des API REST et des microservices
mission.4: Écrire des tests unitaires et d'intégration (JUnit, Mockito)
mission.5: Participer aux revues de code et aux rituels Scrum
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in développement informatique
profile.3: Proficiency in Spring Boot, Hibernate, Maven
